description.value: You've stopped treating your strikes and your spellwork as two separate things. Now the element flows through every blow in the flurry, each impact carrying the same charge

system.benefits:
You can channel elemental energy through your Rapid Strikes flurry. When using Rapid Strikes (3 attacks in one action):

  • Choose to spend 4 Energy total (instead of 2 per strike)
  • Make ONE weaving check for your chosen element
  • Apply the weaving result to ALL THREE strikes
    • 1 success: Each hit deals +[[/damage 4 type=elemental]] damage
    • 2 successes: Each hit deals +[[/damage 8 type=elemental]] damage

usage.text: When using Rapid Strikes, costs 4 Energy total
